articles.title: Palace releases video of dela Rosa, Padilla leaving Senate premises
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Palace on Wednesday shared footage of Senators Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa and Robin Padilla leaving the Senate premises together before dawn last Thursday, May 14, hours after a shooting incident. Dela Rosa was seen wearing a dark-colored jacket and a cap in the video, while Padilla wore a light-colored long-sleeved shirt. READ: PNP: Dela Rosa, Padilla seen leaving Senate hours after shooting One of the clips showed Padilla first entering the Senate parking lot, followed by a woman also wearing a cap, and then dela Rosa.
